rationale: Review 2's lead finding (missing `HopfAlgebra.antipodeAlgHom`) is hallucinated — the module docstring lists the actual public API precisely and `antipodeAlgHom` appears nowhere in the diff; acting on it wastes effort on out-of-scope work. The remaining two findings (visibility of `antipode_convMul_id`, `@[simp]` on `mapValue_comp`) are minor and contested, not enough to prefer a review whose primary claim is fabricated.
